name: ecommerce-geo-auditor
description: Comprehensive GEO audit for e-commerce pages. Diagnose exactly why a product page, listing, or store is not appearing in AI search results (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini, Google AI Overview). Produces a detailed audit report with specific fixes. Triggers: GEO audit, why am I not in ChatGPT, AI search audit, not appearing in AI results, GEO score, AI visibility audit, check GEO, audit AI search readiness, why doesn't AI recommend me.
triggers: why am I not in ChatGPT
why is my competitor in AI results
metadata_note: Knowledge-based skill. No API calls required. Provides deep GEO diagnostic audit with evidence-backed findings and prioritized fix roadmap. Refers to Nexscope GEO Check tool for automated live-URL scoring.
